sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19763" key="beliko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βελικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n19763.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to projectiles</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βελικά, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, work by Agesistratus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:8:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
